subject: session date
fact: The session date is Feb 1st, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Feb 1st, 2026

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: Black Ember Outpost is a great, black fortress built directly into the wall of a massive Underdark cavern.
source_quote: polished obsidian of Black Ember Outpost was built directly into the cave wall

subject: Great Hall
fact: The Great Hall is a titanic chamber nearly one hundred feet wide and long inside the outpost.
source_quote: a titanic chamber nearly one hundred feet wide and long

subject: Fire Giant sergeant
fact: A Fire Giant sergeant was attempting to drill a squad of ogres and hell hounds in the Great Hall.
source_quote: A Fire Giant sergeant attempting to drill a squad of miserable ogres and bored hell hounds

subject: Ogres
fact: The ogres were wearing ill-fitting uniforms and looked miserable and bored while being drilled.
source_quote: miserable ogres and bored hell hounds

subject: Hell hounds
fact: The hell hounds looked bored and sat at attention during the drill.
source_quote: The hell hounds look bored

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur used magical manipulation to strip the ogres of their ill-fitting uniforms.
source_quote: Felkur had used magical manipulation to strip the ogres of their ill-fitting uniforms

subject: Daein
fact: Daein created the illusion of a female hellhound to distract the male hell hounds.
source_quote: Daein created the illusion of a female hellhound to distract the males

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas delivered a devastating blow to the fire giant sergeant with her oath-sworn bow.
source_quote: Akritas delivered a devastating blow to the fire giant sergeant with her oath-sworn bow

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim waded into battle against the ogres and hell hounds.
source_quote: Bramgrim waded into battle

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear savagely finished off the remaining ogres.
source_quote: the Owlbear savagely finished off the remaining ogres

subject: auditory illusion
fact: Daein mimicked the fire giant's voice to convince listeners that the giants had won the battle.
source_quote: Daein mimicked the fire giant's voice with uncanny precision, convincing anyone listening that the giants had won the battle

subject: illusion vanity
fact: Daein's performance included the giant remarking that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful.
source_quote: the performance included the giant remarking that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful

subject: Kennel
fact: The party navigated past a kennel reeking of burned hair.
source_quote: navigating past a kennel reeking of burned hair

subject: Storeroom
fact: The party reached a storeroom where more ogres hauled water from a well under the watchful eye of another fire giant.
source_quote: reached a storeroom where more ogres hauled water from a well under the watchful eye of another fire giant

subject: Well
fact: The well in the storeroom is the entrance to the Path of Shadows.
source_quote: Recognizing this well as the entrance to the Path of Shadows

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim silenced the area to prevent any alarms during the fight in the storeroom.
source_quote: Bramgrim silenced the area to prevent any alarms

subject: Fire Giant
fact: A fire giant landed a bone-crushing blow on Daein in the storeroom.
source_quote: the fire giant landing a bone-crushing blow on Daein

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim lost his concentration after being struck by an ogre in the storeroom.
source_quote: Bramgrim losing his concentration after being struck by an ogre

subject: Daein
fact: Daein killed an ogre and struck the giant twice while winking at the cleric in the storeroom.
source_quote: Daein responded with relentless fury, killing an ogre and striking the giant twice while winking at the cleric

subject: Bramgrim's change of tactic
fact: Daein's display shamed Bramgrim into abandoning his healing-only approach to unleash devastating magic.
source_quote: a display that shamed Bramgrim into abandoning his healing-only approach to unleash devastating magic

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas delivered the final blow to the fire giant in the storeroom.
source_quote: Akritas delivered the final blow to the fire giant

subject: Storeroom secured
fact: The room was secured after the fire giant was killed.
source_quote: the room was secured
